title: RPL root: status_cbor and s_rank not updated from s_dodag; dodag_id not derived from EUI64 or prefix
description: encode_status_cbor and s_rank still use hardcoded #define instead of s_dodag.rank and lichen_rpl_dodag_is_root. DODAG ID is arbitrary ULA not matching gateway EUI or BR prefix per spec 6.1/12. Update coap_status and gateway init to sync from dodag. Discovered-from:project-LICHEN-t4in
